data.content:
The file is generated successfully but never added to the `Compile` item group. Since MSBuild globs expand at **evaluation time** (before targets run), the generated file is invisible to the compiler.

**Fix:** Add the generated file to `Compile` and register it with `FileWrites` for clean support.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add generated file to compilation and register for clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and generates the file, but it never adds the generated file to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild globs are expanded at evaluation time (before any targets run), so the generated file isn't picked up automatically.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `<Compile>` item group within the target, after writing it. Also, the file should be registered with `<FileWrites>` so it gets cleaned properly.

Let me invoke the `including-generated-files` skill to confirm my understanding.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add generated file to compilation and register for clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds and runs correctly. Here's the diagnosis:

**Root cause:** MSBuild globs (implicit `<Compile Include="**/*.cs">`) expand at **evaluation time**, before any targets execute. The `GenerateSampleCode` target writes the file during **execution time**, so the compiler never sees it.

**Fix:** Added an `<ItemGroup>` inside the target to explicitly include the generated file in `Compile` (so it's compiled) and `FileWrites` (so `dotnet clean` removes it):

```xml
<ItemGroup>
  <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
  <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
</ItemGroup>
```
